title: Mnyama Check
desc: Flutter app for livestock health tracking — subscriptions, notifications, and a refreshed UI for field use.

title: Mnyama Collector
desc: Companion app for field teams to collect and log animal disease data, structured for AI model training.

title: Agrovet POS
desc: In-app inventory + point-of-sale system handling stock, sales, and payment flows for agrovet outlets.

title: SmartINNO Platform
desc: Six backend microservices, an internal video-conferencing service, and a React metrics dashboard for leadership.

title: Security Scan Platform
desc: Web app integrating OWASP-based scanning tools so clients can scan targets and surface vulnerabilities.

title: 3D Catalog (Three.js)
desc: Scan a QR code to load an interactive 3D view of an item — a web experience for a virtual catalog.
